_comment: Phase 1 eval set. Every question must be answerable from data/graph.json (5 papers, their authors, topics, institutions). 'entities' lists canonical strings a correct answer should contain; single-token entities >= 4 chars (FlashAttention, Transformer, BERT, LoRA, Vaswani, ...) are where the trie entity guard (A2) is measurable. Edit freely.

questions.text: What is FlashAttention?
Who is the author of FlashAttention and where do they work?
What architecture does BERT build on?
What does LoRA stand for and what problem does it solve?
Who wrote the paper Attention Is All You Need?
Which paper introduced the Transformer architecture?
What is GPT-3 and who published it?
Which papers cite Attention Is All You Need?
What topic does FlashAttention introduce?
Who introduced LoRA and which institution were they at?
What pre-training approach does BERT use?
How does FlashAttention relate to the Transformer?
Which institution is Ashish Vaswani affiliated with?
What kind of fine-tuning does LoRA enable?
Summarize what BERT contributed to NLP.
Who is Tri Dao and what did he publish?
Compare BERT and GPT-3 in terms of their approach.
What makes FlashAttention memory-efficient?
Which authors are affiliated with OpenAI?
What problem in attention does FlashAttention address?
Name the paper that adapts large language models with low-rank updates.
Trace the lineage from the Transformer to FlashAttention.
